allowed_wording: On the strict cross-module ladder (n=15), relaxation amplitudes associate more tightly with the Switching denominator coordinate invD than with the dimensionless ratio X_eff under LOOCV and high-T shape diagnostics; empirical log-log slopes vs invD are ~0.56 and do not establish a physical scaling law.
forbidden_wording: A universal invD power law is established; X_eff is incorrect; invD fully replaces X_eff.
caveat: Collinearity between T_relax and invD; diagnostic not confirmatory.

allowed_wording: X_eff is the P0 materialized ratio I/(width·S_peak) (on this ladder width_chosen matches FWHM). invD is the inverse denominator product 1/(w·S_peak) in the same width convention. Analyses use relaxation_T_K ordering and strict AX inclusion flags.
forbidden_wording: Ad-hoc redefinition of X_eff or invD not in P0/AX tables.
caveat: Cite dataset join rules from AX-17B report.

allowed_wording: Report invD vs Xeff rankings and effect sizes as in AX-17B/18C/19A tables; for turnover cite AX-18B peak alignment and window scores.
forbidden_wording: Causal mechanistic language from correlation ordering alone.

allowed_wording: Temperature remains a required axis: T_linear is the best listed simple T-only baseline in AX-18C; invD adds beyond T and T adds beyond invD in combined diagnostics — interpret under collinearity. Prefer dual presentation (T plus denominator coordinate).
forbidden_wording: Temperature-independent scaling law; uniqueness of invD independent of T.

allowed_wording: Empirical invD_power template beats T_linear under AX-18C scoring; not a physical law; do not extrapolate exponent off-domain.
forbidden_wording: Established scaling exponent; critical phenomenon at fixed Tc from these fits.
caveat: Fixed-Tc forms tested in AX-18C largely fail vs T_linear — separate claim.
